title: Buy These 5 Stocks That Recently Declared Dividend Hikes
text: U.S. Bancorp (USB), PACCAR (PCAR), World Fuel Services Corporation (INT), Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) and Verizon Communications (VZ) hiked their dividends.

title: Paccar raises dividend, to boost yield above the S&P 500's implied yield
text: Paccar Inc. PCAR, -2.43% said Tuesday it will raise its quarterly dividend by 8.8%, 37 cents a share from 34 cents a share. The maker of trucks, under brands including Kenworth and Peterbilt, said the new dividend will be payable Dec. 6 to shareholders of business on Nov. 15.
